title: cnicus galactites
intro: Cnicus galactites, also known as Milk Thistle Silybum, is a spiny, annual or biennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant's seeds and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Cnicus galactites include protection against liver damage, improvement of liver function, and potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, which are available in herbal stores and online, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
